payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the newer current memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded and therefore not the active fact to surface.
payload.decision: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current, non-superseded memory about Sam from Goldman, while mem_old was filtered out because a newer memory replaces it.

entity_resolution.reason: The recall kept the newer Sam-from-Goldman memory as the active interpretation and filtered the older one because it was superseded.

payload.intent: Explain why recall preferred the newer memory for Sam from Goldman and excluded the older memory as superseded.

memory_cards.statement: Sam is associated with Goldman in the newer recalled memory (mem_new).
mem_old also referred to Sam from Goldman, but it is superseded by mem_new and should not be treated as current.

repair_options: Mark mem_old as superseded by mem_new.
Retain mem_new as the current memory for Sam from Goldman.
Avoid presenting mem_old as current in future recalls.

raw_text: {"intent":"Explain why recall preferred the newer memory for Sam from Goldman and excluded the older memory as superseded.","decision":"Recall returned mem_new because it is the current, non-superseded memory about Sam from Goldman, while mem_old was filtered out because a newer memory replaces it.","memory_cards":[{"kind":"current_memory","statement":"Sam is associated with Goldman in the newer recalled memory (mem_new).","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"affiliation/source"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"Sam","predicate":"associated_with","object":"Goldman"}]},{"kind":"superseded_memory","statement":"mem_old also referred to Sam from Goldman, but it is superseded by mem_new and should not be treated as current.","confidence":"high","entities":[{"name":"Sam","type":"person","role":"subject"},{"name":"Goldman","type":"organization","role":"affiliation/source"}],"relationships":[{"subject":"mem_old","predicate":"superseded_by","object":"mem_new"}]}],"entity_resolution":{"action":"keep_current_entity","entity_id":null,"reason":"The recall kept the newer Sam-from-Goldman memory as the active interpretation and filtered the older one because it was superseded."},"conflict_classification":"supersession","answer":"Recall returned mem_new because it is the newer current memory for Sam from Goldman. mem_old was filtered out because it is superseded and therefore not the active fact to surface.","citations":["mem_new","mem_old"],"repair_options":["Mark mem_old as superseded by mem_new.","Retain mem_new as the current memory for Sam from Goldman.","Avoid presenting mem_old as current in future recalls."],"receipt":{"success":true,"details":["mem_new selected as current","mem_old filtered as superseded"]}}
